content: Sweet potatoes are bright orange and rich in vitamin A and beta carotene, while yams are pale and lower in these nutrients.
Sweet potatoes contain slightly more protein than yams, but yams have a lower glycemic index and load, making them better for blood sugar control.
Yams have a lower sodium content compared to sweet potatoes, which can help reduce hypertension and water retention.
Mixing sweet potatoes and yams can provide a balanced combination of nutrients and lower sodium levels.
